title: New Pokémon Update v1.5 Released
excerpt: 5 new Pokémon added in the latest update!
content: The v1.5 update brings 5 new Pokémon including the legendary Flamexor! Also includes balance changes and new recipes. Update now to experience the new content.
image_alt: New Pokémon Update v1.5 Released illustrated news cover

title: Patch Notes v1.4.3 - Balance Changes
excerpt: Major balance changes to fire-type abilities
content: Fire-type abilities have been adjusted. Flamexor nerfed by 10%. Charmuddy buffed. Fire Boost recipe duration increased to 1 hour.
image_alt: Patch Notes v1.4.3 - Balance Changes illustrated news cover

title: Spring Festival Event Starting Soon
excerpt: Limited time spring festival with bonus drops
content: Spring Festival starts March 20! +50% rare drops and +100% XP for 2 weeks. Special recipes available during event.
image_alt: Spring Festival Event Starting Soon illustrated news cover

title: New Shadow Marsh Habitat Now Available
excerpt: Face the ultimate challenge in Shadow Marsh
content: Shadow Marsh is now open! Face Shadowclaw, the new legendary ghost Pokémon. +60% ghost drops. Only for Level 25+.
image_alt: New Shadow Marsh Habitat Now Available illustrated news cover

title: Community Build Competition Winners
excerpt: Check out the top community builds
content: Congratulations to our build competition winners! Top 3 builds featured on homepage. Winners receive 5000 gems each.
image_alt: Community Build Competition Winners news cover

title: Thunder Arena Grand Opening
excerpt: New habitat Thunder Arena now open!
content: Thunder Arena opens at Level 22. Home to Voltscale, the legendary electric dragon! +55% electric drops. Bring Thunder Strike recipe!
image_alt: Thunder Arena Grand Opening news cover

title: Bug Fixes and Performance Improvements
content: Fixed crash when entering Shadow Marsh. Improved frame rate on mobile. Fixed recipe_buff not applying correctly.
image_alt: Bug Fixes and Performance Improvements news cover

title: Summer Beach Event Coming Next Month
content: Summer Beach Event in June! New water Pokémon. Special Sunny Beach habitat. Beach-themed recipes and cosmetics.
image_alt: Summer Beach Event Coming Next Month news cover

title: New Player Guide: Getting Started
content: New to Pokopia? Check out our getting started guide. Learn about habitats, recipes, and how to catch your first Pokémon.
image_alt: New Player Guide: Getting Started news cover

title: Community Submissions Now Open
content: Community submissions now open! Submit your best builds, guides, and fan art. Top submissions featured on site.
image_alt: Community Submissions Now Open news cover

title: Double XP Weekend Event
content: Double XP this weekend! March 15-17. All habitats. Stack with Lucky Charm for triple XP. Perfect time to level up!
image_alt: Double XP Weekend Event news cover

title: Top 10 Most Popular Pokémon
content: Results are in! Pikafire takes #1 spot. Flamexor #2. Shados #3. See the full list on our Tier List page.
image_alt: Top 10 Most Popular Pokémon news cover
